description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring three large, flat front panels that likely serve as doors or drop-down compartments. The cabinet stands on four slender legs, elevating it slightly off the ground and giving it a light, modern appearance. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, suggesting a natural or lightly finished veneer. The sides and back are plain, with no visible hardware or decorative elements, emphasizing its clean lines. There are no visible handles or knobs, indicating a push-to-open mechanism or concealed grips. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for storing items in an urban environment such as a lobby, office, or residential hallway.
description: A tall, minimalist wooden cabinet with three large front panels and slender legs, finished in a light natural wood tone. The design is clean and handle-free, emphasizing modern simplicity.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large, flat panels and four slender legs, with no visible handles or hardware.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and the flush, uninterrupted wood grain along the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, continuous wood surface with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and clean side profile.
